name: CHINA OCEANWIDE HLDGS
summary: China Oceanwide Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property investment, real estate development, energy, and finance investment and other activities in the United States, Indonesia, the People's Republic of China, and Hong Kong. It owns and rents two office and commercial properties in Shanghai; develops real estate properties in the United States; provides management services; invests in debt and equity securities; and develops two coal-fired steam power plants with a net capacity of 150 megawatt each in the Medan industrial zone of Indonesia. The company was formerly known as Hutchison Harbour Ring Limited and changed its name to China Oceanwide Holdings Limited in December 2014. China Oceanwide Holdings Limited is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. China Oceanwide Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Oceanwide Holdings International Company Limited.
